message:
fix(doctor): propagate CSV parse errors in patrol-not-stuck Dolt query

When csv.ReadAll() fails in checkStuckWispsDolt, return the error
instead of swallowing it as (nil, nil). This ensures the caller
correctly falls back to the JSONL path when CSV parsing fails,
rather than silently reporting no stuck wisps.

Post-merge fix for PR #1980.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
